name: Tire Fire Rally
short_description: Race through increasingly ridiculous and unsafe tracks as you fulfill your sponsor-inflicted contract at the Tire Fire Rally.
detailed_description:
Features:

  • Functional Driving Mechanics: Mechanics put together by someone who has at least read about cars, and knows they are large and go fast.

  • Insane Tracks: From loop-de-loops to dodging tipped RVs, every course is a test of how well you can handle your ride and anticipate the insane race organizer.

  • Rogue NPC Competitors: Your rivals race as if they're all trying to make it home from the bar before their wives wake up. Cars will be dented, walls will be scraped, there's a respawn mechanic for a reason.

  • A Series of Ridiculous Cars: Collect a motley series of vehicles to race with, ranging from "Cars I wanted as a middle-schooler" to "The worst possible racer I can conceive of."

So buckle up (seriously, safety first) and get ready to race like you’ve never raced before.
